The men hold spears.
The men wear pants.
Trees are in the background.
back_translation: The men stand. The men hold spears. The men wear pants. The trees exist.
target_caption: Ie'pa bák se' shkë́ki ie, Wö́su̱k ie'pa e̱' chö tö irir ká̱ bulu' e̱na̱ ie'pa wö̀ki kò̱s íyi tso' e' wë́rke . Ká̱ i̱â̱i̱â̱ ie'pa bák sè̱nu̱k ká̱ i' ki̱.

predicted_caption: Bö' ar. Bö' butûtû. Yë́jkuö tso' bö' ki̱. Yë́jkuö sulë. Íyi sarûrû. Yë́jkuö tso' bö' ki̱. Íyiwak tso' bö' ki̱.
english_intermediate:
A banner hangs.
The banner is white.
A drawing is on the banner.
The drawing depicts a figure.
The figure is yellow.
Text is on the banner.
Animals are on the banner.
back_translation: The banana hangs. The banana is white. The drawing is on the banana. The drawing is beautiful. The figure is yellow. The text is on the banana. Animals are on the banana.
target_caption: Datsi’ tak wö̀a sarûrû, i kí̱ka íyi diö́köl wanyö’tso wè̱s: tkabë̀, sàl, ók, na̱mù̱ e̱na̱ tsawì.

predicted_caption: Pë'pa kalö̀tök. Pë'pa shkö̀k. Ù tso' shkíshkî a̱.
english_intermediate:
People dance in a town.
People wear clothes.
Buildings are in the background.
back_translation: The people dance. The people walk. The buildings are in the background.
target_caption: Ta̱î̱ pë’ dapàna̱ ká̱ kibí a̱ íyi ujtéchök. Ie’pa a̱ñì̱ wö̀ie i ká̱ ujtéchök.

predicted_caption: Ù tso' ká̱ ĩ́s ki̱. Kàl tso'. Ù tã́ĩ.
english_intermediate:
A house stands on grass.
Trees are in the background.
The house is big.
back_translation: The house is on the grass. There are trees. The house is big.
target_caption: Ù sulë pámi̱k ta̱î̱ ká̱ wë́rke tsipátsipa, wö́su̱k ká̱ í̱te̱ idir.

predicted_caption: Wë́m dur. Ù wa̱ ù wö́kir tso'. Kàl tso' shkíshkî a̱.
english_intermediate:
A man stands outdoors.
A building has a roof.
Trees are in the background.
back_translation: The man stands. The building has a roof. The trees are in the background.
target_caption: Ù wë́rke bë̂rie élwe. Êköl wë́m yë̂âr ù wö́su̱k. Ie’ kalö̀io dalôlô, pàio sarûrû.
